suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Extend the ci-runner secret-leak review procedure to cover uploaded UI-dump XML files, not just `logcat-*.txt`, because RecoveryPhrase leaks can survive in `uiautomator dump` artifacts even when screenshots are protected by `FLAG_SECURE`.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Round 2 found a blocking leak path through `window_dump.xml` and `flow-error.xml`, and the round-3 fix review still observed that `.factory/skills/ci-runner/SKILL.md` only instructs mnemonic/hex scans on `logcat-*.txt` while mission guidance now requires scanning uploaded XML dumps too.
